name: game-3d-coop
description: 2-player co-op 3D web game with authoritative WebSocket server.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @game/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @game/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @game/client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @game/shared && npm run test --workspace @game/server && npm run test --workspace @game/client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @game/shared && npm run build --workspace @game/server && npm run build --workspace @game/client
